name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Fix: the credit/debit + balance summary now shows on the stat-card popups too — last update it only appeared on the Search page.
Open any stat card to see Credit in, Debit out and Net; the Store card also shows your current and selected-date closing balance.
